speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank hai
text: Subah se mere haath kaanp rahe hain, samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon. Achanak se aankhon ke aage andhera chha gaya aur main bacchon ke samne hi rone lagi. Ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai, mera dimaag bilkul blank hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional flood and bodily overwhelm as per Sequential Coping protocol.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise achanak darr ka koi toofan aap par haavi ho gaya hai, jisne aapko poori tarah gher liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank hai
text: Haan, main saans bhi nahi le paa rahi theek se. Aise apne hi bacchon ke samne toot jana... mujhe strong rehna tha par himmat hi nahi bachi. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha, dimaag bilkul blank hai mera.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her duty-bound need to appear strong for her children.
text: Aapko lagta hai ki maa hone ke naate aapko hamesha mazboot dikhna chahiye, aur aise waqt mein bacchon ke samne tootna aapko andar se aur bhi tod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah mobile pe EMI bounce ka message dekhte hi meri himmat jawab de gayi. Mummy ke kidney treatment ne meri MNC ki saari savings wipe out kar di hain. Ab aage kya hoga mere bacchon ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence regarding her children's future after revealing the financial stressor.
text: Ek taraf mummy ki bimari aur doosri taraf savings khatam hone ke baad ab apne bacchon ke aane wale kal ko lekar ek bohot bada darr baith gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Main akele sab sambhalti hoon, single mother hoon, toh kisi aur pe depend bhi nahi kar sakti. Ye hospital bills aur ab EMI ka notice... log kya bolenge ki main akele apni family ko nahi chala paa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a shorter restatement and soft pause.
text: Sab kuch akele apne kandhon par uthane ke baad, ab aaspas ke logon ke taano ka khayal aapko aur akela kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Akela toh hoon hi. Office mein bhi dimaag nahi lagta. Kitchen ka kaam bhi chhut raha hai. Agar job chali gayi toh rent, EMI, bacchon ki school fees... sab kaise manage karungi main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the overwhelming weight of future obligations stretching out.
text: Jab se yeh saari pareshaniyan ek sath aayi hain, tab se aage ka har ek din aur har ek mahina kaise niklega, yeh soch kar hi ghabrahat ho rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek time tha jab maine apni MNC job aur bacchon mein sab perfectly balance kiya tha. Par ab lagta hai sab mere haath se phisal raha hai. Main ek acchi maa nahi ban paa rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting deeper exploration of her self-blame after sufficient mirroring.
text: Jab aap kehti hain ki aap ek achi maa nahi ban paa rahi hain, toh us waqt aap khud ko kis cheez ke liye sabse zyada kasoorwar thehra rahi hoti hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank hai
text: Mujhe ye guilt hota hai ki meri wajah se mere bacchon ko suffer karna padega. Mummy ka treatment zaroori tha, par us chakkar mein savings wipe out ho gayi. Mera dimaag bilkul blank hai ki dono ko ek sath kaise bachaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific unexpressed exhaustion and guilt stemming from her dual roles.
text: Lagta hai aap is 'single mother' aur 'beti' hone ke doहरे (double) farz ke beech buri tarah thak chuki hain, aur dono ko bachane ki koshish ka yeh akelepan aapko andar hi andar nichod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak toh bohot chuki hoon. Raat raat bhar jaag kar calculations karti hoon. Par akele kitna karungi? Koi emotional support nahi hai mere paas. Kabhi kabhi itna thak jati hoon ki lagta hai sab chhod kar kahin door chali jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing her exhaustion and suicidal ideation/escape wish as a natural reaction to immense dual burden.
text: Jab ek hi insaan par do peedhiyon ki zimmedari aur akelepan ka bojh aa jaye, toh aisi ghutan aur door chale jane ka khayal aana bohot aam baat hai. Ek working single mother hone ke naate aapne already bohot badi ladai akele ladi hai, aur yeh mushkil sthiti aapki kabiliyat ki kami nahi, balki halaat ki gehrai ko dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe hain. Maine bohot struggle karke apni ye MNC job secure ki thi apne bacchon ke ache future ke liye. Par abhi bhi, ye financial debt ka pressure mujhe saans nahi lene de raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote to normalize financial ruin from medical emergencies in metro professionals.
text: Aaj kal bohot si single mothers aur professionals mein yeh dekha gaya hai ki ek sudden medical emergency unki salon ki savings khatam kar deti hai — yeh sirf aapke sath nahi ho raha hai, par log is financial bojh ke baare mein baat nahi karte kyunki apni kamzori dikhana allowed nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... koi nahi chahta ki log unhe lachar samjhein. Khaas kar meri jaisi single working aurat ko toh society wese hi judge karti hai. Par ab is chakkar mein kaam pe focus nahi hai, warning bhi mil sakti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her fear of losing her identity and livelihood.
text: Aapko yeh fikar khaye ja rahi hai ki agar is thakawat ki wajah se office mein aapki performance giri, toh aap apni wo aakhri identity aur bacchon ka aarthik support bhi kho dengi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Aur wo main afford nahi kar sakti. Bacchon ki aankhon mein mujhe wahi old, strong mom dekhni hai. Mujhe batao main ab kya karoon? Is panic se bahar aana chahti hoon main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable options suited to her MNC and banking context.
text: Is panic ko thoda control karne ke liye hum do chote kadam utha sakte hain, jo aapka zyada waqt nahi lenge. Pehla, aaj office ke HR se 'compassionate leave' ya work-from-home extension ke liye baat karna. Dusra, bank customer care ko call karke medical emergency ka reason de kar EMI restructuring ka pata karna. Aapko abhi kaunsa kadam thoda aasan lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank hai
text: HR se leave maangna toh thoda risk lagta hai mujhe abhi job security ke chakkar mein. Par bank wale option pe soch sakti hoon. Halanki mera dimaag bilkul blank hai ki bank walo ko exactly kya bolna chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the bank call into a single, less intimidating step.
text: Pehle ek glass paani pi lijiye aur lambi saans lijiye. Phir bank ko phone karke bas itna kehna hai ki, 'Ghar mein medical emergency thi jiski wajah se is mahine thodi dikkat hui hai, main restructure ke options janna chahti hoon.' Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas itna bolna kaafi hoga? Mujhe darr hai ki wo mujhse directly paise mangenge ya thoda rude bolenge. Default hone par debt collectors ke calls ka bada khauf hota hai mind mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing bank protocols to reduce her specific fear of debt collectors.
text: Corporate banking mein medical emergencies ke liye standard protocols aur grace periods hote hain, yeh unke liye ek aam process hai. Jab aap samne se unhe inform karti hain, toh wo debt collectors bhejne ke bajaye aapko options provide karne par dhyan dete hain kyunki isse unhe bhi assurance milta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar aisa hai toh main zaroor try kar sakti hoon. Sach mein, agar mujhe bank se kuch mahinon ka time mil jaye toh main bacchon aur mummy ko bina panick kiye theek se manage kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her relief regarding her caregiving abilities once the immediate threat is handled.
text: Thoda sa samay aur mohlat milne se, aapko yeh tasalli hogi ki aap apne bacchon aur mummy ka dhyan ek shant mann se rakh payengi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas yahi chahiye mujhe is waqt. Subah jab andhera chhaya tha aankhon ke aage, mujhe laga sab khatam ho gaya. Par ab thoda lag raha hai ki situation bad hai par control ki ja sakti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from complete overwhelm to cautious hope and agency.
text: Mujhe mehsoos ho raha hai ki wo subah ka extreme darr aur bebasi ab thodi kam ho gayi hai, aur uski jagah ek nayi himmat ne le li hai jahan aap wapas apna rasta khud bana rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh maa ko karni hi padti hai na. EMI bounce ho gaya, theek hai, manage hoga. Main bank me call kar lungi kuch der mein. Pehle bacchon ke liye kuch khana bana leti hoon jaa kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her natural return to her caregiving duty.
text: Maa hone ki zimmedari aapko wapas apne pairo par khada kar deti hai, chahe haalat kitne bhi mushkil kyun na hon...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Bacchon ne aaj mujhe subah achanak rote hue dekha tha, mujhe unhe pyaar se samjhana bhi hai ki mamma is okay now. Wo bechare dar gaye honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Checking in on her feelings regarding this relational mending with her kids.
text: Bacchon ko pass bitha kar, apne aapko unke samne wapas shant dikhate hue unhe is bare mein samjhane ka khayal aapko andar se kaisa lag raha hai abhi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank hai
text: Ab utna darr nahi lag raha. Main unhe bolungi ki bas nani ki tabiyat ki wajah se thoda stress tha, but hum manage kar lenge. Mera dimaag bilkul blank hai wali wo ghabrahat ab chali gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her competent handling of the children's emotional needs.
text: Yeh soch apne aap mein bohot pyari aur sakaratmak hai; bacche apni maa mein hamesha ek hero dekhte hain, aur unhe tasalli dena ki aap nani ki fikar mein pareshan the, aapne waqayi ek bohot mature tareeke se isko handle karne ka faisla kiya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya aapka. Kisi se is baare mein bina judge hue baat karke bohot halka feel hua. Main apni MNC job mein bhi apne manager ko medical emergency ka ek chota sa brief de dungi kal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her restored capacity to plan for the future.
text: Ab aap aane wale kal ki chunautiyon ko ek-ek karke theek se face karne ke liye pehle se kahin zyada taiyar mehsoos kar rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, abhi ke liye bas yahi focus hai. Pehle kitchen ka kaam, phir bacche, aur phir bank ka call. Ek ek step hi lena theek rahega mere liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing with an empowering systemic normalisation of her strategy.
text: Yeh 'ek ek step' wali strategy aisi complex situations mein sabse zyada asardar hoti hai; jab bhi aage kisi chiz ka bojh zyada lagne lage, toh yaad rakhiyega ki poore pahaad ko ek din mein nahi chadna hota, bas agla kadam sahi lena hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha hai ki achanak yeh kya ho raha hai. Andar se ajeeb si ghabrahat ho rahi hai, jaise sab kuch bikhar jayega aur log baatein banayenge. Usi darr se mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the overwhelming inner panic using Lens F to validate the emotional flood of Sequential coping.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the implied fear of letting the children down using Lens E.
text: Lagta hai bacchon ko is haalat mein dekh kar tumhe unke future ka bahut bada darr sata raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Sach kahu toh subah se ek message dekha hai phone pe, uske baad se meri halat aisi hai. Mujhe darr hai main unhe ek safe life nahi de paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the role/duty of being a mother using Lens B to acknowledge the source of her distress.
text: Ek maa hone ki poori zimmedari nibhate hue, us message ne tumhare andar bacchon ki suraksha ko lekar chinta badha di hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Bank ka notification tha, EMI bounce ho gayi hai meri. Maine hospital bill ke liye bacchon ki FD aur shaadi ka sona sab bech diya tha. Selling assets ke naam par aakhri yahi tha. Upar se divorced hone ki wajah se neighborhood shame aur zillat itni hai ki pucho mat.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational sacrifice using Lens C, highlighting how she gave up everything for her family while facing societal backlash.
text: Ek taraf akeli tumne apne parivaar ki jaan bachane ke liye apna sab kuch daaw par laga diya, aur dusri taraf society ka taana jhelna pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haan... sach kahu toh ab mere andar koi himmat nahi bachi hai aur mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai sochte sochte ki is akela-pan ka ant kahan hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question after two consecutive restatements yielded no new disclosure, exploring the depth of her isolation.
text: Akele is financial bojh aur samaj ki is thakan ko sehte hue, andar hi andar yeh akelapan tumhe aur kis tarah exhaust kar raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Main physically aur mentally poori tarah thak gayi hoon. Akele bachon ko bada karna aur saare EMI manage karna, aisa lagta hai ki ab main ek bhi din aur nahi jhel paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core exhaustion of carrying duty-based financial debt alone (C5 + Duty_Based logic).
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki akele poori family ki financial chinta uthate uthate aur taane sehte hue, tum bilkul toot chuki ho aur andar se deeply exhausted mehsoos kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Sahi me, kabhi kabhi sochti hoon ki kya mere hone se mere bacchon ko koi fayda hai ya nahi. Aisa feel hota hai main completely burden hoon unke liye aur meri wajah se wo suffer kar rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handled moderate risk flag with a restatement using Lens B, followed by the safety protocol question.
text: Bacchon ke liye ek maa hone ki itni zimmedari akele uthane ke baad bhi jab lagta hai ki tum unke liye kaafi nahi ho, toh yeh dukh aur bhaari ho jata hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haan, main theek hoon, fikar mat kijiye. Main koi galat kadam nahi uthaungi, bacchon ka mere siva is duniya me koi nahi hai. Bas thoda share karke halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressed mild risk with a warm normalising line, then affirmed her worth separately from the EMI failure.
text: Tumhara is haalat mein bacchon ki fikar karna hi dikhata hai ki tum kitni majboot maa ho. Ek single mother ke liye akele hospital aur bank ka medical karz sambhalna kisi ke liye bhi overwhelming hota hai, aur EMI bounce hone se tumhari mamta ya planning galat saabit nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Par hamare yahan ek single aurat par koi jaldi bharosa nahi karta. Padosi toh pehle hi char baatein banate hain ki akeli rehti hai, ab agar is karz ki baat khulegi toh izzat utaar denge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responded to stigma cue with a shorter restatement ending in a soft pause using Lens E.
text: Akele sab sambhalne ke baawajood, samaj ki in baaton ka darr tumhe kisi se khul kar madad maangne se bhi rok raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haan, bilkul yahi darr hai mujhe. Isiliye main din bhar chup rehti hoon aur andar hi andar ghutan ki wajah se mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai puri tarah.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used systemic self-disclosure once to normalise the hidden financial struggle of single mothers due to societal judgment.
text: Main samajh sakti hoon yeh kitna akelapan lata hai. Ek single mother ke roop mein aise badhte medical debt se akele gujarna bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi iske baare mein bolega nahi kyunki society ka judgment aur taane sabko dara dete hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Shayad aap sahi keh rahe ho ki baaki auraton ke sath bhi aisa hota hoga jo akele bacchon ko dekhti hain. Mujhe lag raha tha main hi fail ho gayi. Par mujhe ab unke liye ladna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her refound resolve tied to her maternal duty using Lens B.
text: Bacchon ki is fikar ne aur ek maa hone ke is ehsaas ne tumhe is mushkil waqt mein bhi andar se himmat haarne nahi di hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haarna toh option hi nahi hai mere paas ab. Par sach kahu toh aage ka rasta dhundhla hai. Mujhe batao kya karoon main is bank ke notice ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered 2 manageable logistical options respecting her time and constraints, suitable for P12 readiness signal.
text: Jab hum mentally tayar hote hain, toh raste khulne lagte hain. Is loan pressure ko thoda handle karne ke liye, kya tum pehle bank manager se apni medical situation explain karke thoda extension maangna chahogi, ya kisi free legal aid service se EMI ke naye rules samajhna behtar lagega?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Free legal aid wale toh mujhe pata nahi kahan milenge itni jaldi. Bank manager se shayad baat kar sakti hoon main, lekin darr lagta hai ki wo samjhenge meri baat ya nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Broke down the bank manager suggestion into a single achievable first step.
text: Darr lagna swabhavik hai, isliye hum isko chote steps mein baatenge. Pehle aaj sirf apne purane sabhi payment receipts aur notice ko ek envelope mein daal lo… phir kal subah manager ko call karke appointment lene ka sochna… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Receipts toh ek folder me jama hain already. Us folder ko nikal kar samne table pe rakh deti hoon. Itna toh main aaj kar hi lungi bina ghabraye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe to normalize that medical crises break financial planning, validating her budget failure is not personal.
text: Jab medical emergency aati hai, toh badhe kharche se kisi ka bhi monthly budget hil jata hai. Yeh bank loan ka system aur penalty harsh hote hain, isme tumhari as a provider koi planning ki kami nahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Sahi kaha, mera irada toh hamesha unhe sabse acchi zindagi dene ka hi raha hai. Parivaar ke liye kiya hai jo bhi kiya hai. Padosiyon ka kya, unko bolne doon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her relational commitment standing strong over neighborhood opinions using Lens C.
text: Tumne ab yeh tay kar liya hai ki tumhara dhyan sirf bacchon ki behtari par rahega, samaj ki in judgment wali baaton par nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question after 2 restatements yielded no new disclosure, focusing on a small self-care action before the kids arrive.

coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai

text: Ek maa hone ke saath saath, us ek cup chai ke zariye tum apne khud ke andar ko bhi thodi si shanti dena chahti ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Sach mein aakhiri jhatka hi tha. Gaon mein mere kisan bhai ki chit fund wali savings thi, usne wo Mummy ke ilaaj ke liye nikal li. Uski mitti ki kamai meri aankhon ke samne doob gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Invite deeper reflection on the specific emotional impact of her brother losing his savings
text: Apne kisan bhai ki itne saalon ki jama poonji is tarah kharch ho jane par, aapke andar khud ko lekar kya chal raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Bohot guilt hota hai, lagta hai meri wajah se bhai karz mein doob gaya. Ab gaon aur biradari mein kya izzat reh jayegi jab logon ko pata chalega ki meri wajah se uske bacchon ka paisa gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue softly without questioning, framing it relationally
text: Parivaar aur samaj ke samne izzat girne ka darr aur is nuksaan ke liye khud ko zimmedar manna bohot bhari pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Bohot bhari... Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod chhad ke kahin aisi jagah chali jaun jahan kisi ko jawab na dena pade. Ye karz aur guilt ab mujhse akele bardaasht nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge mild risk normally, then name the unexpressed EXHAUSTION of carrying the debt alone
text: Ye sunkar mujhe aapki fikar ho rahi hai, par aisi mushkil mein kahin door chale jane ka khayal aana samajh aata hai. Lagta hai ki is lagatar financial pressure aur bhai aur bacchon ki fikr ne aapko andar se poori tarah nichod kar exhaust kar diya hai, aur ab lachar mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Nichod hi diya hai. Main akeli bacchon ki poori padhai aur sab dekhti hoon, aur ab ye naya bada crisis. Mujhe sach mein nahi pata agla mahina kaise nikalega ya log mere bare mein kya kahenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her reality as a single mother facing urban medical debt, separating worth from outcome
text: Akele bacchon ki zimmedari uthana aur upar se achanak aaye medical bills ka doobna kisi ko bhi tod sakta hai, is phase mein lachar mehsoos karna ekdum natural hai; par is financially tough waqt ka matlab ye nahi ki aap ek nakam maa hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Par jab sab kuch koshish karne ke baad bhi fail hota hai, toh waisa hi lagta hai. Main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi aaj jab bank ka message aaya. Lag raha tha dharti phate aur main andar sama jaun, takki kist bharna na pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue softly without questioning, framing it as a feared consequence
text: Apni saari koshishon ke baad bhi jab EMI ka message dekha, toh khud ko us shame se bachane ke liye gayab ho jane ka mann kiya...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Haan, wahi lagta hai... Par phir un masoom bacchon ka chehra samne aa jata hai. Main unhe is halat mein akele nahi chhod sakti. Par ye recovery agents aur society ki baaton ka darr meri jaan nikal raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the shame of medical debt via systemic context to reduce isolation
text: Hamare yahan middle-class parivaaron mein medical emergencies ki wajah se achanak aisi EMI bounce aur karz mein phans jana bahut common hai — sirf aapka nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki izzat aur recovery agents ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Wahi izzat ka darr hi toh andar se kha raha hai mujhe. Par main apne bacchon ke liye is darr se bahar nikalna chahti hoon. Aap hi batao, kya koi raasta hai in bank walon ko rokne ka taaki main theek se aage ki soch sakun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe to show banking structure is not a personal judgment
text: Ek baat samajhna zaroori hai ki banking loan structure achanak aayi medical emergencies ke hisaab se nahi bana hota; isliye aisi halat mein kist ka bounce hona system ka fail hona hai, yeh aapki niyat ya aapki aukaat par sawal nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Par bank ke agents meri majboori thodi samjhenge? Unki calls aur message se mujhe aisi ghabrahat hoti hai ki meri dhadkan badh jati hai. Bacchon ke samne main rona nahi chahti par sambhala nahi ja raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty-based frame of wanting to shield her children from her distress
text: Aapke andar ka darr aur panic isliye aur bhi badh raha hai kyunki aap har haal mein apne bacchon ko is tension se bachakar ek mazboot maa dikhna chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Bilkul. Main unke bachpan par apne karz ki parchai nahi padne dena chahti. Mujhe is roz roz ke darr aur calls se bachne ka koi temporary solution bataiye please, main sach mein action lena chahti hoon ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer actionable, low-effort steps to regain control over the immediate harassment
text: Hum do choti cheezein aaj try kar sakte hain: pehla, bank ki taraf se aane wale unknown numbers ko apne phone setting mein mute kar dena, aur doosra, jab waqt mile toh branch ko bas ek line ka email karna ki medical halaat ki wajah se EMI ruki hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Email main raat ko likh lungi jab bacche so jayenge. Par unknown numbers ko mute karna? Agar unhone aur koi legal action le liya meri chuppi dekh kar, toh main akele kaise face karungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through one simple immediate step to reduce anxiety right now
text: Chaliye abhi ke liye bas pehla chota step try karte hain, pehle phone ki setting mein jayiye... aur unknown calls ko sirf aaj raat tak ke liye silent kar dijiye... phir bas phone side mein rakh dijiye, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Theek hai, maine mute par daal diya phone ko. Ek thodi si chanti mili hai, lag raha hai dimaag ko thoda break mila in lagatar bajne wali ghantiyon se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relief from continuous auditory triggers
text: Har phone call ke bajne ke sath jo ek lagatar panic chal raha tha, us shor se thodi der ki hi sahi, par ek shanti mili hai ab.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Bohot zaroori thi ye shanti. Subah se main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi thi inhi calls ke chalte. Ab main thoda saaf soch paa rahi hoon ki kal bhai ko bhi call karke asal halaat batane honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shifting relational duty towards transparently informing her brother
text: Apne kisan bhai ke prati apni zimmedari ko samajhte hue, aap ab khud aage badhkar usse is mushkil waqt ki haqeeqat batane ki himmat juta rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Haan, main badi behen hoon na. Usne socha tak nahi paise dete waqt. Main usko dilaasa dungi ki haan thoda waqt lagega, par main uski poonji aur bacchon ka haq mitti mein milne nahi dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational trust and her commitment to resolving the conflict
text: Aapke aapas ke is gehre bharose aur rishte ki ahmiyat ne, aapko is mushkil mein bhi apni haar manne se rok liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Bilkul rok liya. Aur agar branch ja kar mujhe thoda waqt mangna pada, toh wo bhi karungi. Par main jaaun toh wahan kisse milun aur kya baat karoon? Ye agent toh bank mein nahi hote honge na?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide structural information on banking practices regarding medical hardships
text: Aaj jab hum bank default ke baare mein baat kar rahe the, toh yaad rakhiye ki har bank branch mein manager ke paas medical emergencies ke liye hardship restructuring protocols hote hain, jinse legally aapko recovery se rahat aur waqt dono mil sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Oh, mujhe pata hi nahi tha ki legally main waqt mang sakti hoon. Manager se seedhe baat karna thoda aasan lagta hai un rude recovery agents ke samne girgidane se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Anchor the readiness to a positive visual of her children to maintain momentum
text: Kal jab aap branch manager se us haq ke baare mein baat karne jayengi, toh apne bacchon ki aisi kaunsi baat ya chehra yaad karke andar himmat banaye rakhengi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Jab wo roz school se aakar mere gale lagte hain aur kehte hain 'Mummy aap sab kar leti ho', bas unki us pyari si muskaan ko yaad rakhungi. Main unko niraash nahi karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final reinforcement of her maternal resilience and worth beyond her financial crisis
text: Ek maa ke taur par apni aakhiri saans tak parivaar ko bachane ka yeh jazba bilkul natural hai, hamare samaj mein aurtein aise hi ghar aur rishton ko bacha kar rakhti hain, aur aaj ka yeh loan bounce hona aapki achi mamta ya kabiliyat ko bilkul kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi
text: Shukriya. Ye sunkar sach mein ek gehra bharosa mila hai. Subah main jis achanak despair mein thi aur main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi thi, ab wo poori tarah khatam ho gaya hai. Ab mere samne raasta saaf hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close the session by mirroring her shift from feared consequence to hope
text: Ab us baat ka darr ki zindagi yahan aakar rukk jayegi, dheere dheere aapke naye aatmvishwas aur roshni mein badal gaya hai ki in halaat ko poori tarah sambhala ja sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai aur bas ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha hai ki kya karoon. Bas wahi darwaze pe baith gayi hoon aaj aur dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai. Bacchon ki taraf dekhne ki himmat nahi ho rahi, unse nazrein milayi bhi nahi ja rahi. Aisa lag raha hai jaise ab aage kuch bacha hi nahi, bas ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a warm normalising line for mild risk, then mirror the feeling of overwhelm and emotional flood without forcing a problem-solving frame.
text: Aise achanak se sab kuch thehar jana bahut bhari lagta hai. Aapke shabdon se ek aisi bebasi jhalak rahi hai jahan bas thakan aur khali-pan aapko har taraf se gher raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein bahut bhari khali-pan hai. Akele sab khinchte khinchte ab himmat toot rahi hai. Pata nahi main akele in bacchon ko aage kaise le jaungi, inka future ab kaisa hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the implied fear regarding the children's future and the burden of being the sole provider.
text: Akele parivar ko sambhalne ki zimmedari ke beech, bacchon ka aane wala kal kaisa hoga, yeh soch aapko poori tarah andar se dara rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr toh lagega hi na. Pata nahi logon ne itna akela kyun chhod diya mujhe jabse main single mother bani. Itni community exclusion jheli hai, aur ab wahi ICU ke kharche raat din dimaag mein ghoom rahe hain...

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the deep relational sting of isolation compounding the recent medical crisis.
text: Apno se jo saath milna chahiye tha uski jagah jo doori mili, us akelepan ne is bimaari aur kharchon ke bojh ko aapke liye aur bhi jyada bhari bana diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Bohat bhaari kar diya hai. Aur aaj toh dimaag bilkul kaam karna band kar gaya hai. Aaj subah bank se call aaya ki mera loan default ho gaya hai. Ye naya hadsa sach mein mere bacchon ko le doobega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Now that the primary stressor is explicitly named, ask how this specific threat is impacting her sense of daily life.
text: Jis tarah se bank ke is call ne aapko darwaze par rok diya, is naye loan ke bojh ka aapki aur bacchon ki rozana zindagi par kya asar padne ka darr lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Asar yahi hoga ki mere bacche society mein muh dikhane layaq nahi rahenge. Mujhe toh lagta hai main sabse buri maa hoon, jo inhe ek theek zindagi nahi de pa rahi. Community taane marti thi, ab meri izzat ka kya hoga?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue ('buri maa') with a short, soft restatement acknowledging the weight of her duty and societal fear.
text: Akele maa hone ke naate bacchon ke liye sab kuch theek rakhne ka dabav, aur samaj ke taano ke darr se aap khud ko hi dosh de rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, guilt feel hota hai mujhe har waqt. Maine socha tha ki akele manage kar lungi, par un ICU ke kharchon ke baad main koi financial help ya gold loan restructure jaisa kuch nahi soch sakti ab. Sab khatam lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying exhaustion and helplessness of dealing with sequential hits (medical, then financial).
text: Lagta hai ki is koshish aur akelepan ki thakan itni gehri ho chuki hai ki ab aage ka koi bhi naya aarthik rasta ya himmat jutana is waqt namumkin sa lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Namumkin hi hai. Main phir se wahi darwaze pe baithi hoon aur andar bas ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai. Agar loan recovery wale aa gaye bacchon ke samne, toh meri bachi kuchi himmat bhi poori tarah toot jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her fear and exhaustion as culturally systemic for single mothers, separating her worth from the financial outcome.
text: Single mothers ko is samaj mein akele ghar aur paise sambhalne mein waise hi bahut zor lagana padta hai; upar se achanak medical kharche aur bank ke call se aisi bebasi aana ekdum jayaz hai, yeh aapki vyaktigat nakami bilkul nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par as-paas ke log toh yahi kahenge na ki akele aurat se ghar nahi sambhala gaya. Jabse mere husband nahi rahe, sabne bas mujhmein kamiyan nikali hain. Yahan bacchon ke school ki fees bhi toh baaki hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic observation about single mothers hiding their financial pain due to fear of blame.
text: Akele parivar chalane wali maaon mein samaj ke taanon ke darr se akele chupchap aarthik bojh sehna bahut common hai — sirf aapka nahi, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki samaj har akele aurat ki pareshani ko uski hi galti maan leta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Sahi kaha apne... meri galti hi nikalte hain hamesha. Lekin is waqt mere dimaag mein bas wahi ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai, jahan mujhe aage badhne ka koi rasta dikhai nahi de raha. Main akele kaise bachaun apne bacchon ko in sab se?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her core fear of wanting to protect her children from the surrounding chaos.
text: Apne bacchon ko is samaj ke taanon aur udhari ki is aanch se door rakhne ki gehri fikr aapko is shanti aur sannate mein ghere hue hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Meri jaan toh unhi mein basti hai. Main khud bhookhi so jaungi, par unko ye kabhi nahi pata chalne dena chahti ki unki maa ek failed insaan hai jo unki basic zarooratein poori nahi kar paa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue ('failed insaan') with a short, soft pause restatement focusing on her protective instinct.
text: Unki khushi aur bhavishya ke liye aap khud har takleef jhel lena chahti hain, bas unki nazron mein nakamyab ya kamzor nahi dikhna chahti...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Kamzor nahi dikhna chahti bilkul, par dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai mera ab. Aap hi batao ab main kya karoon? Mujhe in bank walon se apne bacchon ko door rakhna hai, koi raasta hai kya izzat bachane ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a structural reframe to alleviate her guilt about the default.
text: Achanak aaye medical emergencies aur aspatal ke bil kisi bhi ache khase chalte parivar ka budget hila dete hain, isme akele aapki koi bhool nahi balki majboori ki sthiti hi aisi hoti hai jahan acche log bhi phas jate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad sthiti kharab thi us waqt... Par bank wale ye majboori thodi samjhenge. Main unse aakhir kaise baat karun, meri toh himmat hi nahi ho rahi ki unka phone utha saku.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide small, actionable steps to communicate with the bank without overwhelming her.
text: Kya aap kal subah bank manager ko ek letter likh kar apne medical papers ke baare mein batana chahengi, ya phir usse pehle phone par customer care se baat karke apni sthiti samjhana theek rahega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Branch jana toh mushkil hoga kyunki as-paas ke log dekhenge. Main phone par customer care ko hi call karke bol sakti hoon ki ICU ke bills ke karan der hui. Par ye bolte hue bhi darr lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the phone call preparation into a very simple execution step.
text: Pehle aap apne bachon ko dusre kamre mein kuch khelne bhej dijiye… phir apne aspatal ke discharge papers samne rakhiye, aur tab customer care ka number mila kar baat kijiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha tha
text: Haan, wo paper mere paas ek file mein hi hain. Sirf aspatal ka kharcha aur date batana hai unhe. Ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha tha andar, ab lag raha hai ki shayad ek chhoti si koshish kar hi sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her transition from paralysis to small action over time.
text: Jo darr pichle kuch ghanton se aapko darwaze par bilkul thehra chuka tha, ab wahan apne bacchon ke liye ek kadam badhane ki nayi himmat jag rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh aakhir mein karni hi padegi bacchon ke liye. Main unhe society ki nazron mein nicha nahi dekhne de sakti. Par thoda dar lagta hai ki agar unhone meri darkhwast ke baad restructure ke liye mana kar diya toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt her to think of alternative local supports if the bank initially says no.
text: Agar wo phone par turant aarthik madad nahi mante hain, toh bacchon ke school ya as-paas aisi kaun si jagah hai jahan se aapko apne baaki kharchon ke liye thoda bharosa ya waqt mil sakta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: School ki principal kaafi samjhdar hain, main unse bacchon ki fees ke liye shayad thoda extra waqt maang sakti hoon. Bank ka mujhe pata nahi kyunki mujhe RBI ke rules ya restructure ka zayada idea nahi tha pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide facts about banking norms to reduce the sense of unknown threat.
text: Banks mein medical emergencies ke chalte aamtaur par hardship options ya EMI repayment ka waqt badhane ke kanooni raaste hote hain, jiske baare mein customer care ki team aapse khulkar baat kar sakti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya tha
text: Acha, aamtaur par hardship options hote hain? Ye toh mujhe kisi ne bataya hi nahi. Sabne bas mujhse duri bana li thi. Subah toh dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya tha isiliye ye basic chizein bhi dhyan nahi aayi mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the relational isolation caused the panic and clouded her judgment.
text: Jab as-paas ke log musibat mein saath chhod dete hain, tab us akelepan aur ghabrahat ki wajah se aksar aisi jaroori jankariyan bhi humare dhyan se poori tarah utar jati hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul yahi hua mere sath aaj. Akele hone ka hi dar sabse bada dushman ban jata hai. Par ab main kal phone pakka karungi bank walon ko. Hospital ke papers ready kar liye hain maine abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her active step in confronting her feared consequence.
text: Bank walo ke achanak ghar aane ke us dar ka samna karte hue, ab aapne sach mein apne papers nikal kar unse seedhe baat karne ka ek pukhta irada kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Irada pukhta hi rakhna hoga mujhe ab. Apne bacchon ki taraf ab main nazrein mila kar dekh sakungi kam se kam. Unka chehra dekh kar hi toh saari himmat aati hai wapas. Main itni jaldi nahi haarti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Amplify her sense of resilience by connecting it to her maternal duty.
text: Apne andar ki is kabhi na haarne wali aur bacchon ke liye datte rehne ki taqat ko yaad karna aapko kal ke us mushkil phone call ke liye kitna mazboot bana raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaafi mazboot bana raha hai ab. Ek maa ko aakhir mein koi hara nahi sakta jab uske bacchon ki izzat aur safety ki baat aaye. Ye loan default aur ye kharab waqt bhi nikal jayega. Main inke liye aage fight karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Summarise her journey across the conversation using the time lens, ending on an encouraging note.
text: Aaj jo din ekdum gahre sannate aur ruk jane wale ehsaas se shuru hua tha, wahi is waqt apne bacchon ke khatir aage badhne aur himmat se ladne ke is naye jazbe tak pahunch gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai
text: Mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai, main bilkul breakdown kar gayi hoon. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas rona aa raha hai aur andar hi andar darr lag raha hai ki ab humein is ghar se bhi nikal diya jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the overwhelming emotional flood and sense of impending loss to validate her panic.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar achanak se darr ka koi bahut bada toofan aa gaya ho, jisme sab kuch haath se chhootta hua mehsus ho raha hai aur saans lene mein bhi ghutan ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, meri saans bilkul atki hui hai. Meri gudiya abhi bahut choti hai, uske papa ke achanak jaane ke baad maine akele usko sambhala hai. Agar sar se ye chhat chin gayi toh main use kahan lekar jaungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the implied feared consequence of losing safety for her child.
text: Ekdum se itna kuch mehsoos ho raha hai ki bachi ko surakshit rakhne ki aakhri jagah bhi shayad chheen li jayegi, aur ye soch kar hi andar ek thehrav sa aa gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai
text: Aaj bank ka EMI bounce alert mobile pe aaya hai, jise dekh kar mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki paise kahan se aayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the suddenness and shock of the notification that triggered the panic.
text: Ab achanak se EMI ka wo message dekhne ke baad ek pal mein jaise dimaag sannaate mein chala gaya hai, kyunki aage ka rasta poori tarah band nazar aa raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rasta toh pehle hi band ho gaya tha. Beti ke accident mein meri saari jama-poonji chali gayi. Jo paise bank ke liye rakhe the, wo hospital aur dawaiyon mein khatam ho gaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational duty and impossible bind between paying for her daughter's survival versus the bank.
text: Apni bachi ki jaan bachane ki maa ki zimmedari aur bank ki kist bharne ke beech, aapke haath poori tarah se bandh gaye hain aur koi dusra vikalp nahi bacha tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Upar se ek sahukaar ka karz pehle se chal raha tha. Wo aadmi jab ghar ke chakkar lagata hai toh biradari aur padosi taane marte hain. Akeli aurat ko aise ghar pe maangte hue dekh log kya kya sochte hain, bahut sharam aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the deep cultural stigma and vulnerability of being a single mother facing neighborhood judgment, ending softly.
text: Bina kisi ke sahare akele apni izzat bacha kar jeene ki koshish mein, samaj aur padosiyon ki in chubhney wali nazron aur taano ka darr andar tak tod deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown
text: Puri tarah toot chuki hoon. Kabhi bank wale phone karenge, kabhi wo aadmi ghar ke bahar khada hoga. Is breakdown mein main theek se job par dhyan bhi nahi de paa rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a gentle question to transition from the external stressors to her internal emotional core conflict.
text: In saari musibaton aur bahar se aate huye dabav ke beech, jab aap apni beti ka chehra dekhti hain toh andar hi andar kis baat ka sabse bada bojh mehsus hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai
text: Uska chehra dekh kar lagta hai ki uske papa ne use achhi zindagi dene ka khwaab dekha tha, par main sab barbaad kar rahi hoon. Main haar rahi hoon, aur yehi bojh soch kar mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core unexpressed feelings of exhaustion and maternal guilt beneath her panic.
text: Lagta hai ki saalo se akele aage badhne ki itni mehnat ke baad, achanak aayi is pareshani ne ek bahut gehri thakan aur bebasi bhar di hai aapme, jisme aapko lagne laga hai ki aap ek buri maa hain, jabki sachchai ye nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sachai kya hai mujhe khud nahi pata. Itni thakan lagti hai andar se ki bas mann karta hai chup chap kahin kone mein baith jau aur bahar niklu hi nahi. Beti ka accident meri hi buri kismat se hua shayad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated her deep exhaustion as culturally normal for single mothers in financial crisis, separating her worth from the accidents.
text: Akele bachi ko bada karna aur ghar ki puri zimmedari apne kandhon par uthana—isme jo sharirik aur mansik thakan aapko ho rahi hai, wo bilkul jayaz hai. Bachi ko chot lagna ya paiso ki ye dikkat aapki kharab kismat ya aapki nakami nahi hai, ye kisi ke sath bhi ho sakta tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par sunne wala kaun hai? Rishtedaar toh aisi sthiti mein kinara kar lete hain. Main sach mein poori tarah se akeli pad gayi hoon is karz ke samundar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the isolation experienced by single women in debt.
text: Ghar akele sambhalne wali maaon mein ye akelapan aur karz ka bojh chupchaap sehna bahut common hai—sirf aap akeli nahi hain is jaddojahad mein, lekin koi openly bolega nahi kyunki samaj akele aurat ko hamesha shak aur taano se dekhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap bilkul theek keh rahe hain. Samaj toh bas tamasha dekhta hai. Mujhe yaad hai jab main usko chot lagne par utha ke bhag rahi thi, logon ki bas aankhen thi mujh par, madad ka hath nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her profound isolation in moments of urgent need regarding her child.
text: Aapne apni bachi ke liye us mushkil waqt mein akeli apni poori himmat laga di thi, aur apno ya samaj ke naam pe wahan kisi ka na hona aapko hamesha ke liye andar se chubh gaya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai
text: Chubha toh hai. Aur wahi sab fir yaad aa raha hai EMI bounce dekh kar, mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai baar baar soch ke. Mujhe theek hona hai, is darr aur ghabrahat se bahar aane ka koi rasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided simple, immediate grounding options to break the panic cycle.
text: Agar aap theek hona chahti hain, toh aage ke baare mein sochne se pehle do chhote kadam liye ja sakte hain. Pehla, abhi turant thoda thehrao le kar paani peena, ya doosra, bachi ke paas bas chupchap 5 minute baithna bina kuch kahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bachi ke paas abhi main rone lagungi shyd, usko darr lag jayega mujhe aise dekh ke. Main pehle wahi baith kar paani peene wali baat sun leti hoon aapki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked the seeker step-by-step through the hydration/grounding suggestion.
text: Bilkul, pehle ek kaam karte hain ki paas se ek glass thanda pani lijiye... phir usko dheere dheere ek ek ghoont karke pijiye... aur aane wale 5 minute tak EMI ya kisi bhi karz ke baare mein kuch mat sochiye, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Paani pee liya maine. Sach mein meri saans theek hui hai thodi. Jab subah uthi thi toh sab theek tha, lekin ye karz ka system hi aisa hai ki gareeb aadmi ko kabhi sukoon se jeene nahi deta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalized the financial trauma of medical emergencies as a systemic failure, not a personal fault.
text: Hamare system mein achanak aayi medical emergency aur mehnge ilaj ka saara bojh aam insaan ki jama-poonji par hi girta hai. Yeh achanak hone wali samasya kisi bhi mehnat kash maa ko tod sakti hai, isme system ki kathorta zyada dikhti hai bajaye kisi ek insaan ki galti ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... yahi sachai hai. Ek maa hone ke naate mera jo farz tha, bachi ki jaan bachana, wo maine kiya. EMI bounce ho gayi toh theek hai, kuch na kuch bandobast niklungi main bank jaa kar aage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her return to maternal duty as a source of strength rather than a source of guilt.
text: Ek maa hone ke naate aapne jo sabse bada apna farz nibhaya, wahi aage ab aapko kisi na kisi tarah in aarthik chunautiyon ka saamna karne ki himmat wapas de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh main juta lungi. Beti ki muskurahat dekh kar hi toh har subah duty pe jaati hoon. Agar main poori tarah tut gayi toh usko kaun bachaega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed her tremendous resilience and maternal strength.
text: Yeh jaan kar sach mein bahut sukoon milta hai ki aapke andar apni gudiya ke liye itni gehri aur mazboot lalsa hai; yahi be-intehaa pyaar hi aapki sabse badi taqat hai jo aaj tak aapko yahan tak aage laayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Mujhe lagta hai mujhe sahukaar wale darr se bhi alag hat kar kuch faisle lene honge. Padosiyon ka sochna band karungi main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her letting go of the feared consequence (judgment) to focus on action.
text: Ghar chale jane ka wo jo poora darr tha aur samaj ka kya sochna hoga, ab wo aage kam hokar khud ko zyada kargar faisle lene ki disha de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown
text: Haan, main breakdown se toh bahar aayi hoon is baat se. Main theek roop se kal ja kar bank ke branch manager se thoda samay mangungi aage ke EMI ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Checked in on how her physical and emotional state feels now that she has a plan.
text: Abhi jab saans aur dhadkan thodi shant hui hain, aur aap kal bank ja kar baat karne ka faisla le chuki hain, toh aapke andar ka darr kaisa mehsus kar raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr kafi kam ho gaya hai. Mujhe samajh mein aa raha hai ki EMI bounce hone se ek din mein ghar se nikal nahi denge, thoda process hota hai. Mera panic karna thoda normal tha us waqt.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her temporal shift from immediate doom to a grounded timeline.
text: Aaj subah ki us ghabrahat wale waqt se ab tak mein kafi aaram aa gaya hai, ye samajhne ke baad ki achanak ek din mein sab kuch chin nahi jayega aur thoda samay milega aage.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Aur sahukaar ki dikkat bhi main dheere dheere nibtaugi. Zindagi jab mushkil mod deti hai toh raasta dikh hi jaata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reminder that banks and formal lenders have restructuring protocols.
text: Aise aarthik sankat ke samay, formal system jaise banks mein restructure karne ke vikalp maujood hote hain jisme wo apni recovery ko kuch samay ke liye dhila kar sakte hain medical karan de kar.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai
text: Ye maloom nahi tha mujhe. Ab thoda aur confidence aa raha hai mujhe. Jis alert ko dekh kar mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya tha, ab main us se ladne ke liye ready hoon. Bohot bohot dhanyawad aapka meri saari bhadas sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her journey from feeling overwhelmed as a duty-bearer to regaining her readiness and strength.
text: Poori tarah se akeli pad jane aur chhat chhin jaane ke us gehraye darr se hokar, ek mazboot maa ke roop mein ab khud tayar khade ho paana bahut badapan dikhata hai.
